name: The Ghost - Task of the Ghost Hunters
short_description: Found your own ghost-hunting agency and face a world haunted by dark forces. In co-op with up to eight players, uncover secrets, hunt intelligent spirits, and shape your reputation through the choices you make.
detailed_description:
In The Ghost – Task of the Ghost Hunters, you’re the one they call when the unknown comes to life. Establish your own ghost-hunting agency and confront a world infused with dark forces. Your mission: uncover the truth, conquer the supernatural, and build your agency into the most successful ghost-hunting team out there.

With up to eight players, you’ll face sinister forces doing everything they can to bring you down. But beware: the ghosts aren't the only danger. Every decision you make influences the course of your hunt. Your reputation will determine the challenges you must face.

Key Features:

  •  Co-op for up to eight players

Team up with your squad to face the supernatural. Each mission demands teamwork, but the courage to fight alone could either lead you to success—or drive you insane.

  •  Build your own ghost-hunting agency

Start small and grow into a feared organization. Your reputation evolves with your accomplishments and shapes the missions you receive.

  • Reputation system

The more successful your hunts, the higher your reputation climbs. But with greater fame come tougher ghosts and more challenging cases.

  •  Dynamic mission manager

Choose from a wide variety of missions designed to test your skills. Work together to uncover the secrets behind each haunting.

  •  Progression system

Every player can specialize. Develop abilities that support your team—whether it’s paranormal analysis, technical expertise, or direct combat.

  •  Economy system

Earn money from successful missions and invest in new gear and tech. The equipment you buy determines how you’ll fight the supernatural.

  •  Day-night cycle and weather effects

The hunt is shaped by changing weather and realistic time-of-day transitions. Be ready for anything the darkness might bring.

  •  Intelligent ghosts

These spirits aren’t just apparitions—they learn from your actions and adapt. They strike when you least expect it.

  •  Hidden clues and secrets

Discover mystical symbols and secret locations to uncover the truth behind the hauntings. Every riddle solved brings you closer to the unknown.

  •  Seasonal events

Take part in regularly updated events with unique challenges and rewards. The unknown never sleeps—it constantly evolves.

  •  High-tech equipment

Use specialized tools to gather evidence and identify spirits. From EMF detectors to thermal cameras—every device serves a crucial purpose.

Get ready.

Your ghost-hunting agency awaits its first mission. What will you do when darkness calls?
